.@SecPompeo on the Department's repatriation efforts: Our team is out there taking care of Americans, keeping our own team safe, and we’ve now brought over 10,000 #AmericansHome from places where they were stranded through no fault of their own. https://t.co/AmZk86OnWG

.@SecPompeo: We’ve now got charter flights and military flights that we’re getting ready to bring people back. We’re working to get everybody back just as quickly as we can. #AmericansHome https://t.co/pI8TjuBfCe

Yesterday, @SpainInTheUSA Amb. Cabanas deposited, with Amb. Reeker, Spain's ratification of the @NATO accession protocol for North Macedonia. .@SecPompeo on #Iran, North Korea, and #COVID19: We are working diligently to create better conditions for their people. Part of that is to make sure that we’re available to provide humanitarian assistance when we can. It's the right thing to do in a time of crisis. https://t.co/d0X5L7tgDx

.@SecPompeo: Early on we offered to have America’s finest experts travel to China to assist them, to assist the @WHO.  We weren’t permitted in. These are the kind of things that the Chinese Communist Party has done that have put the world and the world’s people at risk. https://t.co/VvUPKjyIV7

.@SecPompeo on China and #COVID19: They tried to suppress this information instead of trying to actually do the work to suppress the virus, which is what the world demanded. The Chinese Communist Party didn’t get it right and put countless lives at risk as a result of that. https://t.co/bxUMnHPvQm

Amidst the current health crisis, we extend warm wishes to all those safely celebrating #Nowruz around the world. Nowruz celebrates the arrival of Spring and a new year and marks a time for reflection and renewed hope. Nowruz Pirouz! Here is how we celebrated at the Department: https://t.co/lc26pgQG9Y

If you feel sick, stay home. For the latest information and updates from @CDCGov about #Coronavirus, how to protect yourself & slow the spread, and resources for the community, visit https://t.co/0d1LhNcKrK. https://t.co/bVM3zKbYU4

If your children are sick, keep them at home. For the latest information and updates from @CDCGov about #Coronavirus, how to protect yourself & slow the spread, and resources for the community, visit https://t.co/0d1LhNcKrK. https://t.co/PMYiDmZNf2

If someone in your household has tested positive, keep the entire household at home. For the latest information and updates from @CDCGov about #Coronavirus, how to protect yourself & slow the spread, and resources for the community, visit https://t.co/0d1LhNcKrK. https://t.co/IYDnpQH5lv

If you are an older person, stay home and away from other people. For the latest information and updates from @CDCGov about #Coronavirus, how to protect yourself & slow the spread, and resources for the community, visit https://t.co/0d1LhNulQk. https://t.co/nTwlDEWfwt

If you are a person with a serious underlying health condition, practice social distancing & stay home. .@SecPompeo on new #Iran sanctions: The time is now for the international community to stand together against Iran’s nuclear extortion. If the world is concerned with Iran’s behavior now, it should consider how Iran would behave with a nuclear weapon. https://t.co/Oj0SCeoIBU https://t.co/q1vIA96uZg
.@SecPompeo on new #Iran sanctions: Iran must be fully transparent with the @IAEAorg and the international community. https://t.co/Oj0SCeoIBU https://t.co/H4t2cHoaXy

.@SecPompeo: We oppose any effort by the ICC to exercise jurisdiction over U.S. personnel. We will not tolerate its inappropriate and unjust attempts to investigate or prosecute Americans. https://t.co/HFgriOeARJ

.@SecPompeo: The United States designated the Assad regime’s minister of defense, Lieutenant General Ali Abdullah Ayoub, for perpetuating the violence and the disastrous humanitarian crisis inside of Syria https://t.co/Ix6KmQzNPr

.@SecPompeo: The State Department is announcing our intent to designate Amir Muhammad Sa’id Abdal-Rahman al-Mawla a Specially Designated Global Terrorist. We’ve destroyed the caliphate and we remain committed to ISIS’s enduring defeat no matter who they designate as their leader. https://t.co/gSSDR27pVM
.@SecPompeo: The @realDonaldTrump administration continues to put an enormous amount of energy into combating the Wuhan Virus and protecting the American people. https://t.co/Ch2HHGfBvv

.@SecPompeo: The State Department remains engaged on all other matters, even as we tackle the Wuhan Virus outbreak. No nation gives so much to defend life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness more than the United States of America. We’re doing that work all over the world. https://t.co/C9FAwioSXM
Find the latest travel advisories and health alerts regarding #Coronavirus at https://t.co/G3AYMssu8v. Follow @TravelGov for the most up to date information on all travel. https://t.co/TMmwv3qJgl

President @realDonaldTrump and the other #G7 leaders are working together to accelerate our response to #COVID19, forcefully address the economic impact of the outbreak, and restore and expand growth. https://t.co/TUAnhsuB0K

.@SecPompeo: We pray for a day when Cuban, Venezuelan, Chinese, Iranians and all peoples can speak and assemble freely without fear of their own governments. https://t.co/R4LjNR83ah #HumanRightsReport https://t.co/LsSzCX5Mb9
.@SecPompeo: Human rights are at the core of what we believe as Americans. https://t.co/gWM5nkbLnb #HumanRightsReport https://t.co/uvkCBIlqb2

#ThisWeekatState, @SecPompeo released the 2019 Human Rights Report and met with our Brazilian and Australian partners. At the direction of President @realDonaldTrump, the Administration is deploying the full range of U.S. resources to fight coronavirus. https://t.co/JpSX3ZiJO5 https://t.co/hbrqznwf3E

U.S.-#Brazil economic ties advance prosperity for both nations. Our economic relationship is rooted in principles of fair trade, market liberalization, and healthy competition. https://t.co/6eN7jThfBg https://t.co/Tm5BYN7d7o

On March 9, 2007, Robert Levinson was abducted in Iran. For 13 years, the Iranian government has denied knowledge of his whereabouts or condition, a claim that defies credibility. We call on the Iranian regime to send Bob Levinson home to his family. https://t.co/Xud7ldscaf

.@SecPompeo: The international community must speak clearly and with one voice: full and transparent cooperation with the @iaeaorg and compliance with the Non-Proliferation Treaty is the only path forward for #Iran. https://t.co/dauyDLW22I

The agreement of the Georgian political dialogue participants is a crucial step towards depolarization and normalization of the political environment in Georgia in the run-up to the parliamentary elections later this year.
.@SecPompeo: Our view is to put pressure on the Iranian regime, to deny them resources to foment terror. https://t.co/ymejZnNP8I https://t.co/EWlMCErb4a

.@SecPompeo on #Iran: The regime must immediately cooperate with the @iaeaorg and fully comply with its IAEA safeguards obligations. All nations must hold Iran accountable to its own commitments. https://t.co/ymejZnNP8I https://t.co/DrVCc1lOrz
.@SecPompeo: Secure property rights are critical for driving innovation, investment, and economic opportunity. #EconomicProsperity https://t.co/d39cdE8KmH https://t.co/ERO5jF4yHM

Empowering women grows economies, reduces dependence, and promotes greater peace. The @WhiteHouse’s Women’s Global Development and Prosperity Initiative (W-GDP) works to ensure women’s access to economic opportunities. Read more here: https://t.co/ZMnZNNkema. #WomensHistoryMonth

Last week, @SecPompeo honored the #WomenOfCourage -- a remarkable group of women who exemplify exceptional courage and leadership in advocating for human rights, women’s equality, and social progress, often at great personal risk. Learn more: https://t.co/ODHRUxsJ2J. https://t.co/TOfAy9xSpr
President @realDonaldTrump: My Administration is committed to empowering all women. https://t.co/DJCuLQRS2Z #WomensHistoryMonth https://t.co/xw5yUEp6cP

On #InternationalWomensDay, the United States is proud to honor women and girls from around the world who have made contributions in lifting up those facing challenges and hardship in their communities. A world with gender equality is a better world for all. #IWD2020 https://t.co/blwRPi8rnB
President @realDonaldTrump: We honor the women who have changed our Nation and the world. https://t.co/DJCuLQRS2Z #WomensHistoryMonth #IWD2020 https://t.co/M4uWKXtTjI

On March 8, we mark #InternationalWomensDay and celebrate women and girls across the globe. The United States supports a world in which women and girls are free to realize their full potential and live in dignity along with their families, communities, and countries. #IWD2020 https://t.co/pRYOxRkAwa

.@SecPompeo on #COVID19: We’ve got an important role to make sure we get travel restrictions right, travel advisories right, so that we know who’s coming across our border, who’s coming into the country that may present risk to Americans here at home. https://t.co/xswsm1uRGQ https://t.co/xVwFYMiluT

#ThisWeekatState, @SecPompeo attended the signing of the historic U.S.-Taliban Peace Deal and hosted the International #WomenOfCourage Ceremony alongside @FLOTUS. He also delivered remarks at the @AIPAC Policy Conference and briefed on the U.S. response to COVID-19. https://t.co/qnGFSq0UGb

.@SecPompeo on the U.S.-Taliban Peace Deal: President @realDonaldTrump has seized the moment. It’s now time to turn the corner to make sure that we are never attacked again from Afghanistan. We can reduce that risk, reduce our cost, and still keep America safe. https://t.co/s2bZBxMacY

.@StateDeptSPOX discusses the Agreement for Bringing Peace to Afghanistan and the United States' commitment to the Afghan people. Watch the full interview here: https://t.co/loLaoQVoQW https://t.co/7NnGdWKQZn

.@SecPompeo: The future of this peace process isn’t just about what we do, or what the Taliban does. It’s about getting the Afghan people together to solve this problem. We’ll stand with you; we’re ready to support you.  Do not squander this opportunity. https://t.co/ymejZnNP8I https://t.co/KADvCz8tJc

U.S. citizens traveling or living abroad can register with the Smart Traveler Enrollment Program (STEP) to receive important safety and security information, including health alerts. Stay informed. Stay connected. Stay safe. Register here: https://t.co/ys61NL6hq3 https://t.co/b1yQ1QKmdj

.@SecPompeo on #COVID19: The State Department continues to support President @realDonaldTrump’s strong leadership and whole-of-government approach to protect Americans. There’s no higher duty for us. https://t.co/ymejZnNP8I https://t.co/Lxa5iY538L

.@statedeptspox on the Agreement for Bringing Peace to Afghanistan and the United States' commitment to the Afghan people. Watch the full interview here: https://t.co/loLaoQVoQW https://t.co/UXvZOGOjYY

President @realDonaldTrump: America stands with the suffering people of Venezuela and Cuba and Nicaragua in their righteous struggle for liberty. We’ll continue working for the day when we will become the first fully free hemisphere in all of human history. We’ll have that day. https://t.co/5mDPHh3de8

#ThisWeekatState, @SecPompeo attended the signing of the historic U.S.-Taliban Peace Deal and hosted the International #WomenOfCourage Ceremony alongside @FLOTUS. He also delivered remarks at the @AIPAC Policy Conference and briefed on the U.S. government's response to COVID-19. https://t.co/r1jDbPoeKv

.@SecPompeo on the U.S.-Taliban Peace Deal: President @realDonaldTrump has seized the moment. It’s now time to turn the corner to make sure that we are never attacked again from Afghanistan. We can reduce that risk, reduce our cost, and still keep America safe. https://t.co/6OkkA1DoSH
.@StateDeptSPOX comments on #COVID19 and Iran. https://t.co/dzfahiZbNG

.@SecPompeo: We expect Beijing to take a more fair approach towards American and other foreign press inside of China. We urge the CCP to immediately uphold its commitments to respect freedom of the press. https://t.co/ymejZnNP8I https://t.co/PIe6kTXHUV

.@SecPompeo: The signing of the U.S.-Taliban agreement in Doha, together with the realization of the U.S.-Afghan joint declaration in Kabul, laid the groundwork for the road ahead toward a lasting peace in Afghanistan. https://t.co/ymejZnNP8I https://t.co/7g3uNZlc2J

.@SecPompeo on #COVID19: The State Department continues to support President @realdonaldTrump’s strong leadership and whole-of-government approach to protect Americans. There’s no higher duty for us. https://t.co/ymejZnNP8I https://t.co/9g6Fd8hjlb

Zarifa Ghafari of #Afghanistan is being honored for her defiant leadership as mayor of Maidan Shar. Her courage to initiate a citywide campaign to reduce littering has inspired girls and women both in her municipality and across the country. #WomenOfCourage https://t.co/qq0g7Etq4T

Ximena Galarza of #Bolivia is being honored for supporting democracy in Bolivia, exposing corruption and violations of democratic freedoms, and empowering fellow journalists to better inform the public of their rights and obligations. #WomenOfCourage https://t.co/vFWYykdbYo

Susanna Liew of #Malaysia is being honored for her tireless efforts to advocate on behalf of members of religious minorities who have been disappeared and protecting religious freedom in her nation. #WomenOfCourage https://t.co/po8yUGkIXx
